response_constraints: Wait for the retrieval result before updating the summary.
Change only the distribution date; preserve the filed permits and count of 42 volunteers.

stages.purpose: Read the volunteer-drive summary before changing its date.

arguments.summary: Volunteer drive: permits filed; 42 volunteers registered; distribution day set for October 10.

stages.purpose: Consolidate the new distribution date while preserving the other facts.

state_assertions: The recursive summary sets distribution day to October 10.
The permits and 42-volunteer facts remain in the summary.

prompt: Retrieve my volunteer-drive summary, move the distribution day from October 3 to October 10, and keep the permit and registration facts unchanged.

tool_results.summary: Volunteer drive: permits filed; 42 volunteers registered; distribution day set for October 3.
